classifications.correctness failure: a mandatory invariant, safe discrete selection, finite-output rule, or scoped numerical contract fails
classifications.exact-equivalent: all applicable exact evidence and numerical values match the frozen baseline
classifications.numerically equivalent within contract: exact structural invariants pass and every numerical delta stays within its scoped contract
classifications.quality-risk: semantic output is currently retained but margins, errors, finite counts, or coverage indicate material risk
classifications.semantically equivalent: required IDs and outputs agree but at least one numerical value is outside the F32-equivalent contract without quality-risk evidence
